---
title: "Acknowledgement"
execute:
  freeze: false
---



```{r setup}
#| echo: false
#| warning: false
#| message: false
#| results: hide
here::i_am("atlas-mnhnl.Rproj")
source(here::here("Atlas", "code", "0_Initialisation.R"))
source(here::here("Atlas", "code", "9_LastHoverfly.R"))
```



## Observer names

```{r}
#| echo: false
#| results: asis
#| warning: false

recorder_counts <- sort(table(MD$Recorders), decreasing = TRUE)
top50 <- names(head(recorder_counts, 50))

all_recorders <- sort(na.omit(unique(MD$Recorders)))

formatted <- ifelse(all_recorders %in% top50,
                     paste0("**", all_recorders, "**"),
                     all_recorders)

cat(paste(formatted, collapse = ", "))
```



## Last Hoverfly recorded

![](last_syrphidae.jpg)

`r species` <br>
`r obs`  <br>
[Voir l'observation](`r obs_url`)
